name: Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets
about: Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets are a combination of two medications used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus. Vildagliptin helps to control blood sugar levels by increasing the production of insulin in the body, while Metformin HCL works by decreasing glucose production in the liver and improving insulin sensitivity. These tablets are taken orally, in accordance with the suggestion of a medical professional. The tablets are in solid form and are to be stored in a dry place. This general medicine is manufactured in India and is available in different dosages as per the requirement of the patient.

faq.q: What is Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets used for?
faq.a: Vildagliptin And Metformin HCL Tablets are used to treat type 2 diabetes mellitus.

Vildagliptin helps to control blood sugar levels by increasing the production of insulin in the body, while Metformin HCL works by decreasing glucose production in the liver and improving insulin sensitivity.

faq.q: How should I take these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets should be taken orally, in accordance with the suggestion of a medical professional.

faq.q: What is the dosage form of these tablets?
faq.a: These tablets are in solid form.
These tablets are manufactured in India.
